title: Assault battalion
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{MilitaryUnit |image=[[File:AssaultBattalion-IS.png]] |name=Assault battalion |type=[[Infantry/Legends|Infantry]]''[[Imperial Sourcebook]]'' |formation=[[Battalion/Legends|Battalion]] |commander=[[Major/Legends|Major]] |second=[[Battalion captain]] (SB1) |staff=*[[Logistics officer/Legends|Logistics officer]] (SB2) *[[Medical officer]] (SB3) *[[Technical officer]] (SB4) *[[Headquarters officer]] (SB5) |subunit=Standard: *1 [[line company]] *2 [[Assault company|assault companies]] *1 [[repulsorlift company]] *[[Battalion headquarters]] **[[Security platoon]] Augmented: *2 line companies[[Imperial Sourcebook (Second Edition)|''Imperial Sourcebook'', Second Edition]] *3 assault companies *2 repulsorlift companies *1 [[artillery battery]] *Battalion headquarters **Security platoon |strength=868 |vehicles=31 [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]] |headquarters= |location= |battles= |formed= |founded= |fragmented= |reorganized= |dissolved= |restored= |affiliation=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] *[[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] }} An '''assault battalion''' was a formation of the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]]. ==Organization== Commanded by a [[Major/Legends|Major]], an assault [[Battalion/Legends|battalion]] was comprised of a single [[line company]], 2 [[Assault company|assault companies]], and a [[repulsorlift company]], with the attendant [[battalion headquarters]] and support personnel. One assault company was always fully equipped, with the average [[Battalion/Legends|battalion]] numbering around 868 personnel, 628 of which were combat personnel supported by thirty-one [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]]. Assault battalions were often employed in urban environments, and were commonly employed as vanguard units for large-scale operations. Assault battalions were given priority over line battalions when it came to fire-support requests, and the battalion was occasionally reorganized so that the fully equipped assault company were carried by elements of the repulsorlift company. Assault battalions could be augmented by the addition of a line company, an additional assault company, an extra repulsorlift company, and an [[artillery battery]]. ==COMPNOR Variant== The [[Assault (CompForce)/Legends|CompForce Assault arm]] also maintained several assault battalions organized into [[COMPNOR Regiment|COMPNOR regiments]]. The main differences between the standard assault battalion and its COMPNOR counterpart was the latter's lower quality of troops and the lack of a security platoon. The lack of internal security can be attributed to a genuine belief within C.O.M.P.N.O.R. that their troops were unquestionably loyal. Compforce troops were generally noted to be more ideologically driven to serve their [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] compared the standard [[Imperial Army trooper/Legends|Imperial Army trooper]] and Imperial [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtrooper]]. This may not apply to individual commanders as some like [[Ivo Laibach]] had a personal bodyguard named [[Zevulon Veers]]. Whether this was common practice is unknown. But the threat of external enemies remained unchanged. One CompForce assault battalion also served onboard the personal [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of the reborn Emperor [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], the [[Eclipse (Eclipse-class)|Eclipse]].''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]'' ==Order of Battle organizational chart==
[[File:AssaultBat.jpg|500px]]
Assault battalion organizational chart on the Imperial Army Order of Battle
